scraped_name: Hermes Constance 18 Blue Saphire Epsom Leather Gold HW Handbag
description: The Hermes Constance 18 Blue Saphire is a stylish shoulder bag crafted from Bleu Saphire Epsom leather with elegant gold hardware. It has a flap design with an H clasp closure for a classic Hermes look. The bag features 3 interior flat pockets and 2 open compartment pockets, offering organized storage. Its compact size of 18 x 15 x 5 cm makes it ideal for carrying essentials. scraped_name: Hermes Birkin 30 Bordeaux Shiny Croco Gold Hardware Handbag
description: The Hermes Birkin 30 Bordeaux is a beautiful handbag made with care and attention to detail. It comes in a 30 cm size, which is just right for daily use or special occasions. The bag offers both style and practicality in a compact form, perfect for carrying essentials like a wallet, phone, and keys. Rich Shiny Bordeaux Color This handbag features a shiny red Bordeaux color that adds charm and boldness to your outfit. The glossy finish makes the color stand out, giving the bag a luxurious and eye-catching appearance. It’s ideal for those who love bright, classic shades. Premium Crocodile Leather Crafted from crocodile leather, this Birkin bag brings a high-end feel with its soft yet structured body. The natural texture of crocodile leather makes each bag unique. The shiny surface enhances the rich red tone and adds a touch of glamour. Gold Hardware Detailing The bag is fitted with gold hardware, including a polished buckle that adds elegance and shine. The golden accents pair beautifully with the red leather, offering a perfect balance of warmth and luxury. These small details complete the timeless design of the bag. scraped_name: Hermes Birkin 35 FEU Orange Epsom Leather Gold HW Handbag
description: The Hermes Birkin 35 FEU Orange Epsom Leather is a luxury handbag made for women who love classic design and high-quality style. With its bold FEU orange color, this Birkin stands out and adds a touch of brightness to any outfit. It’s a true fashion statement from the famous Hermès brand. Made from Strong Epsom Calfskin Leather This bag is crafted from fine Epsom calfskin leather, known for its strong texture and elegant finish. The leather is used both outside and inside for a complete premium look. It features a flap top with gold-tone turnlock closure, adding shine and safety to your belongings. Spacious and Practical Design With a size of 35 cm, the Birkin 35 offers great space for everyday use. It has one main compartment, along with interior slip and zipper pockets to help you stay organized. The top handle has a 13 cm drop, making it easy to carry by hand. Complete with Original Accessories This Hermes Birkin comes with the original dustbag, lock, and key clochette. All these details make it a perfect choice for collectors or anyone looking for a luxurious and stylish handbag.
